name: The Sailor Pen Co., Ltd.
summary: The Sailor Pen Co., Ltd. produces and sells writing instruments worldwide. Its Stationery division offers fountain pens, ballpoint pens, mechanical pencils, fude pens, marking pens, inks, correction fluids, sheets, and gift accessories. This division also operates and manages an online shop. The company's Robot Equipment division manufactures and sells standard machines, such as automatic takeout robots for plastic injection molded products; custom-made machines, including automation equipment, stock equipment, factory automation systems, and order-made equipment; and handling robots of semiconductors, metal press, etc. Its Special Machinery division manufactures and sells pachinko prize dispensers and labor-saving equipment for prize vendors; and general prizes for the amusement industry. The company was founded in 1911 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
